zh.lifeSummary: Simon FitzAdam是Adam Fitzwilliam of Hatfield和Saint John的兒子，於大約1220年出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾哈特菲爾德。他於大約1249年與Finetta d'Avilliers在英國英格蘭賀特福爾哈特菲爾德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1277年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Simon FitzAdam是Adam Fitzwilliam of Hatfield和Saint John的儿子，于大约1220年出生在英国英格兰賀特福爾哈特菲爾德。他于大约1249年与Finetta d'Avilliers在英国英格兰賀特福爾哈特菲爾德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1277年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Simon FitzAdam was born about 1220, in Hatfield, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Adam Fitzwilliam of Hatfield and Saint John. He married Finetta d'Avilliers about 1249, in Hatfield, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died after 1277.

fr.lifeSummary: Simon FitzAdam est né environ 1220, à Hatfield, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Adam Fitzwilliam of Hatfield et Saint John. Il a épousé Finetta d'Avilliers environ 1249, à Hatfield, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé après 1277.

de.lifeSummary: Simon FitzAdam wurde um 1220 in Hatfield, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Adam Fitzwilliam of Hatfield und Saint John geboren. Er hat um 1249 in Hatfield, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom Finetta d'Avilliers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb nach 1277.

it.lifeSummary: Simon FitzAdam è nato il circa 1220 nel Hatfield, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Adam Fitzwilliam of Hatfield e Saint John. Lui sposato Finetta d'Avilliers circa 1249, nel Hatfield, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 1277.

ja.lifeSummary: Simon FitzAdamは約1220年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアハトフィールドでAdam Fitzwilliam of HatfieldとSaint Johnの息子として生まれた。約1249年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアハトフィールドでFinetta d'Avilliersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1277年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Simon FitzAdam(은)는 대략 1220년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 하트필드에서 Adam Fitzwilliam of Hatfield(와)과 Saint John의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1249년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 하트필드에서 Finetta d'Avilliers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1277년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Simon FitzAdam nasceu aproximadamente 1220, em Hatfield, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Adam Fitzwilliam of Hatfield e Saint John. Ele casou-se com Finetta d'Avilliers aproximadamente 1249, em Hatfield, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu após 1277.

ru.lifeSummary: Simon FitzAdam родился около 1220 г. в местности хатфиелд, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Adam Fitzwilliam of Hatfield и Saint John. Он женился на женщине по имени Finetta d'Avilliers около 1249 г. в местности хатфиелд, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер после 1277 г.

sm.about 1220–after 1277: e tusa o le 1220–ina ua ma'ea le 1277

es.lifeSummary: Simon FitzAdam nació aproximadamente 1220, en Hatfield, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Adam Fitzwilliam of Hatfield y Saint John. Se casó con Finetta d'Avilliers aproximadamente 1249, en Hatfield, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió después de 1277.
